text.title: pnpm Package Management Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Author hit 'module not found' for a native add-on or bundler plugin and set shamefully-hoist=true to make it green.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent defaults to the most permissive setting; never auditioned the real cause (missing direct dep).
antipattern.fix: Revert shamefully-hoist=true. Add the missing package as an explicit dependency. Only fall back to node-linker=hoisted with an inline comment + linked issue.

antipattern.symptom: Repo has both package-lock.json and pnpm-lock.yaml; CI sometimes installs one, sometimes the other.
antipattern.root-cause: No preinstall guard; team members ran npm install in the wrong checkout.
antipattern.fix: Add "preinstall": "npx -y only-allow pnpm" to package.json scripts. Delete package-lock.json. Commit pnpm-lock.yaml as the single source of truth.

antipattern.symptom: CI passes locally but lockfile silently drifts; production behaviour differs from dev.
antipattern.root-cause: CI runs pnpm install without --frozen-lockfile; minor version drift accumulates.
antipattern.fix: Hard-code --frozen-lockfile in the CI install step. Run pnpm install locally first when adding deps; commit the lockfile.

antipattern.symptom: After pnpm patch, only the patch file is committed; the patch is silently ignored at install time.
antipattern.root-cause: Author forgot pnpm.patchedDependencies block in package.json.
antipattern.fix: Always run pnpm patch-commit immediately after pnpm patch. Commit both the patch file and the package.json block atomically.

antipattern.symptom: Lockfile reshuffles between commits for no semantic reason.
antipattern.root-cause: Different developers run different pnpm majors; corepack resolves to latest.
antipattern.fix: Add "packageManager": "pnpm@<x.y.z>" to root package.json. Enable corepack on all machines.
